summary: Capture http.NewRequestWithContext error in socials handler, record on the result row, skip the request instead of dereferencing nil req.
reason: A handle with URL-unsafe characters (e.g. control bytes) made url.Parse fail, req nil, and req.Header.Set on the next line panicked.
validated_outcome: Smoke-tested `socials` with control-char input — each platform returns the parse error as `note` with no crash.
